_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of innovation program design, including ideation methods, prototype development approaches, value hypothesis construction, and stage-gate evaluation criteria.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-001 (DA, cosine: 0.503), LS-S-011 (LS, cosine: 0.490).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.568). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [integration, processes, technology] vs WIDAI-only terms [approaches, construction, criteria, design, development, evaluation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.901 (P=0.938, R=0.866). P exceeds R by 0.071 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Knowledge of technology integration processes." and "Knowledge of innovation program design, including ideation methods, prototype de" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.504 < STS 0.568 (gap -0.063). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [integration, processes, technology] and [approaches, construction, criteria] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [integration, processes, technology]. WIDAI-only: [approaches, construction, criteria, design, development, evaluation].
